arkhe 0.4.0.9000

Data Cleaning

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/clean.R
remove.Rd

Removes empty row/column or row/column with missing/ infinite values or zeros.

Usage

remove_NA(x, ...)

remove_Inf(x, ...)

remove_empty(x, ...)

remove_zero(x, ...)

# S4 method for matrix
remove_NA(x, margin = 1)

# S4 method for matrix
remove_Inf(x, margin = 1)

# S4 method for matrix
remove_zero(x, margin = 1)

# S4 method for matrix
remove_empty(x, margin = 1)

Arguments

x

A matrix, a data.frame or a *Matrix object.

...

Currently not used.

margin

An integer giving the subscript which the cleaning will be applied over (1 indicates rows, 2 indicates columns).

See also

Other utilities: replace()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Create a count data matrix
X <- CountMatrix(sample(1:10, 25, TRUE), nrow = 5, ncol = 5)
k <- sample(1:25, 3, FALSE)

## Add zeros
X[k] <- 0L
## Remove row with zeros
remove_zero(X, margin = 1)
#> 2 rows were removed:
#> * row4 (n=1)
#> * row5 (n=2)
#> <CountMatrix: 3 x 5>
#>      col1 col2 col3 col4 col5
#> row1    6    2    5    5    4
#> row2    7    4    1    3    1
#> row3    2    4    2    3    5
## Remove column with zeros
remove_zero(X, margin = 2)
#> 3 columns were removed:
#> * col1 (n=1)
#> * col2 (n=1)
#> * col5 (n=1)
#> <CountMatrix: 5 x 2>
#>      col3 col4
#> row1    5    5
#> row2    1    3
#> row3    2    3
#> row4    5    2
#> row5    8    6

## Add NA
X[k] <- NA
## Remove row with zeros
remove_NA(X, margin = 1)
#> 2 rows were removed:
#> * row4 (n=1)
#> * row5 (n=2)
#> <CountMatrix: 3 x 5>
#>      col1 col2 col3 col4 col5
#> row1    6    2    5    5    4
#> row2    7    4    1    3    1
#> row3    2    4    2    3    5
## Remove column with zeros
remove_NA(X, margin = 2)
#> 3 columns were removed:
#> * col1 (n=1)
#> * col2 (n=1)
#> * col5 (n=1)
#> <CountMatrix: 5 x 2>
#>      col3 col4
#> row1    5    5
#> row2    1    3
#> row3    2    3
#> row4    5    2
#> row5    8    6

On this page

arkhe is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 1.9000.9000.9000.
